name: folder-downloader
author: sidhanthapoddar99
title: Folder Downloader
description: Recursively resolve an HTTP directory listing (nginx/Apache/Caddy autoindex or a JSON listing) into a folder resource so Gopeed can download a whole folder tree at once, preserving its structure.

settings.name: userAgent
settings.title: User-Agent
settings.description: User-Agent header used when crawling the listing and downloading files.
settings.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

settings.name: maxDepth
settings.title: Max recursion depth
settings.description: How many sub-folder levels to descend into. 0 = only the root folder.

settings.name: concurrency
settings.title: Concurrent listing requests
settings.description: How many directory pages to fetch in parallel while crawling.

settings.name: maxFiles
settings.title: Max files
settings.description: Safety cap on the total number of files resolved from one folder.

settings.name: headers
settings.title: Extra request headers
settings.description: Optional extra headers, one per line as 'Name: Value' (e.g. a Cookie or Authorization header).
